name: medical office administrators in small clinics processing 5–15 patient intakes/month tool
description: For medical office administrators in small clinics processing 5–15 patient intakes/month, inefficient manual processing causes delays in patient care. We automate onboarding instead of manual data entry into electronic health records.
target_audience: medical office administrators in small clinics processing 5–15 patient intakes/month
problem_solved: Inefficient manual processing of patient intake forms.
